Issue:
Add strerror(3)-type strings for gurt/daos errors
DAOS-2458 added code to convert numeric error codes into string representations of the values (e.g. -1005 -> "DER_NONEXIST"). This is an improvement over raw error codes, but still falls somewhat short in the usability department.

A proposed improvement would be to add more verbose error messages

Issue:
Telemetry improvement - Use flags to enable per metric locking
Provide flags when registering a new metric that are used to enable/disable the use of mutex protection for that metric.  This is a performance improvement that eliminates the overhead of a mutex when it is deemed unnecessary.

Issue:
Unify client stack io retry control
Currently, the client stack io retry logic is controlled by both the obj_auxi_args::io_retry and the temporary variable io_retry in the function obj_comp_cb(). That may bypass the retry logic in the subsequent operations, such as dc_obj_update/dc_obj_punch.

Issue:
Handle ENOSPACE gracefully
Requirements of ENOSPACE handling:

- Reserve enough space in VOS for space reclaim procedure like GC or aggregation, so that to avoid deadlock or server crash when system is running short of space.
- Prioritize GC & Aggregation under space pressure.
- Make sure no false -DER_NOSPACE to client.

Issue:
Make Event CB to the public API
We allow internally registering a completion callback on an event.

However we don't expose that currently to users and the API is hidden in include/daos/event.h

Move this functionality to a public API since it was requested by users (Spark WG).

Issue:
improve LRU evicting without full scan
The current LRU scans all the items to evict unused ones, this is inefficient if there millions of items and could possibly cause huge latency and performance drop for some extremely testing eg like IO500.
